displayName: Auto-Queue from Shape and Auto-Release Lanes
userOutcome: Dispatcher scans SHAPE.json for ready candidates and auto-creates Work Orders. Completed lanes are automatically released and worktrees cleaned up.
scopeSummary: Add auto_queue_from_shape() scanning SHAPE.json files for ready candidates without Work Orders. Add release_completed_lanes() releasing shipped lanes and cleaning worktrees. Wire both into dispatch_ready_work().
risks: Auto-queue might create Work Orders for features the user hasn't reviewed
readinessReason: Dispatcher and lane infrastructure exist. Shape scanning is file iteration. Lane release is status update + worktree removal.
handoffSummary: Add auto_queue_from_shape(root) to dispatcher.py. Add release_completed_lanes(root) to dispatcher.py or lane.py. Wire both into dispatch_ready_work().
